CATALYST-GROW_POWER.description: Attacks deal more damage. At the end of its turn, loses 1 [gold]Grow[/gold].
CATALYST-GROW_POWER.smartDescription: [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] Attacks deal [blue]{DamageIncrease}%[/blue] more damage. At the end of its turn, loses 1 [gold]Grow[/gold].
CATALYST-GROW_POWER.title: Grow
CATALYST-CONCENTRATION_POWER.title: Concentration
CATALYST-FLOATING_POWER.description: After this creature performs an Attack, it takes damage equal to its [gold]Levitate[/gold]. At the end of its turn, loses 1 [gold]Levitate[/gold].
CATALYST-FLOATING_POWER.smartDescription: After [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] performs an Attack, it takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage. At the end of its turn, loses 1 [gold]Levitate[/gold].
CATALYST-FLOATING_POWER.title: Levitate
CATALYST-FROM_THE_EARTH_POWER.descriptio: At the start of each of your turns, begin Concentrating again. Each stack prepares 1 Grow and 2 Levitate for everyone.
CATALYST-FROM_THE_EARTH_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of each of [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] turns, begin Concentrating again. Each stack prepares 1 Grow and 2 Levitate for everyone.
CATALYST-FROM_THE_EARTH_POWER.title: From the Earth
CATALYST-TEMPERATURE_POWER.description: Signed room Temperature. Negative values are colder; positive values are hotter. The valid range is -3 to +3.
CATALYST-TEMPERATURE_POWER.smartDescript: The room's Temperature is [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. Negative values are colder; positive values are hotter.
CATALYST-TEMPERATURE_POWER.title: Temperature
